test_url.title: Test Page URL
test_url.description: Full URL of the test/Q-bank page — navigate to Item 1 first, then paste the URL here.

max_questions.title: Max Questions to Scrape
max_questions.description: Stop after this many questions. Set to 0 or omit to scrape all.

start_from.title: Resume From Question Number
start_from.description: Skip ahead to this question number (1-indexed). Useful for resuming interrupted runs.

delay_min_ms.title: Minimum delay between questions (ms)
delay_min_ms.description: Minimum milliseconds to wait between questions. Increase to reduce bot-detection risk.

delay_max_ms.title: Maximum delay between questions (ms)
delay_max_ms.description: Maximum milliseconds to wait between questions (random jitter applied).

save_audio.title: Save Audio Files
save_audio.description: If true, base64-encoded audio is decoded and saved to the Key-Value Store.

headless.title: Run Browser in Headless Mode
headless.description: Uncheck only for local debugging. Always leave checked on Apify platform.
